    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AIR_FRAGRANCE_TYPE_ID
      Get the fragrance type ID installed in the fragrance slot。 The fragrance ID is used to match the fragrance information configured in the cloud.
      static int ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_DIRECTION_ADJUST
      Electric air outlet direction adjustment for air conditioner 空调电动出风口方向调节(原adaptApi接口HVAC_FUNC_ELECTRICAL_AIR_VENT_POS) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 三个值。第一个代表x轴横向位置坐标；第二个代表y轴纵向位置坐标；第三个代表z轴位置坐标； jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-30 17:40:57
      static int ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_SWITCH
      Electronic air outlet switch 空调电动出风口开关(原adaptApi接口HVAC_FUNC_ELECTRICAL_AIR_VENT)（FlymeAuto实现指用户主动的开关操作，并非指实车出风口是否出风） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-30 17:36:18
      static int FAN_AUTO_STATUS
      fan speed auto state, Original AdaptAPI: HVAC_FUNC_AUTO_STATUS 自动风量状态, 原AdaptAPI：HVAC_FUNC_AUTO_STATUS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-11-08 16:35:44
      static int FAN_DIRECTION_AUTO_STATE
      Realistic selection status of blowing mode in Auto mode, Original AdaptApi:HVAC_FUNC_FAN_DIRECTION_AUTO_STATE Auto模式下吹风模式真实选中状态,原AdaptAPI:HVAC_FUNC_FAN_DIRECTION_AUTO_STATE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IHvac.FanDirectionAuto property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-11-08 15:57:05
      static int HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE
      to turn On or Off air fragrance 香氛功能开启和关闭。（和香氛浓度等级重合，处于废弃状态） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:12:15

      to set air fragrance level.
      static int HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_LOW
      The low status of air fragrance for a special slot IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br> * Use with zone IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br> 香氛的剩余量是否不足。香氛槽域AREA对应关系参考 IHvac.AirFragranceSlot ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type true:余量不足 false：余量正常 jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-02 13:03:35

      fragrance residue,fragrance remaining percentage, rang from 0 to 100 香氛剩余量，取值范围0~100。香氛槽域AREA对应关系参考 IHvac.AirFragranceSlot ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 0～100 jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:21:40

    • Field Detail

      • HVAC_CLEAN_ZONE

        static final int HVAC_CLEAN_ZONE
        When CLEANZONE is unavailable, the icon displays in a grayed out state; Only when all of the following conditions are met, will the opening work be displayed: 1. All car doors and tailgate are closed; 2. All car windows are closed; 3. The air conditioning fan has started; 4. The internal and external circulation is in AUTO mode; Otherwise, it will display as not working. CLEANZONE 不可用时，图标显示为置灰状态;只有满足所有以下条件时，显示开启工作：1.所有车门和尾门关闭；2.所有车窗关闭；3.空调风扇已启动；4.内外循环为AUTO模式；否则显示未开启工作。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • IHvac.CleanZoneState property type
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:11:03
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_LEVEL

        static final int HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_LEVEL
        to set air fragrance level. 香氛浓度等级设置.香氛槽与AREA对应关系参考 IHvac.AirFragranceSlot.不区分则传VehicleAreaSeat#SEAT_ROW_1_LEFT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • IHvac.AirFragranceLevel property type
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:20:12
        See Also:

      • HVAC_FRAGRANCE_MARGIN

        static final int HVAC_FRAGRANCE_MARGIN
        fragrance residue,fragrance remaining percentage, rang from 0 to 100 香氛剩余量，取值范围0~100。香氛槽域AREA对应关系参考 IHvac.AirFragranceSlot
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer property type 0～100
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:21:40
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HVAC_AUTO_DRY

        static final int HVAC_AUTO_DRY
        The air conditioner dries automatically when the vehicle is locked. After the vehicle is electrically locked while driving, the air conditioner may automatically run the blower for a certain period of time to blow out the condensed water in the evaporator and air duct to prevent water accumulation and moldy odor from contaminating the cabin. 锁车空调自干燥。车辆行驶下电锁车后，空调可能会自主运行鼓风机一定时间，吹出蒸发器和风道中的冷凝水，防止水积聚产生霉味污染座舱。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:23:03
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • AIR_FRAGRANCE_TYPE_ID

        static final int AIR_FRAGRANCE_TYPE_ID
        Get the fragrance type ID installed in the fragrance slot。 The fragrance ID is used to match the fragrance information configured in the cloud. * 0: indicates no fragrance<br>* Use with zone IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br> 获取香氛槽安装的香氛类型ID。香氛ID用来和云端配置的香氛信息进行匹配。* Use with zone IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br>areaId{SEAT_ROW_1_LEFT,SEAT_ROW_1_CENTER,SEAT_ROW_1_RIGHT,SEAT_ROW_2_LEFT,SEAT_ROW_2_CENTER}
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer property type
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-29 16:46:51
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_LOW

        static final int HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_LOW
        The low status of air fragrance for a special slot IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br> * Use with zone IHvac.AirFragranceSlot<br> 香氛的剩余量是否不足。香氛槽域AREA对应关系参考 IHvac.AirFragranceSlot
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type true:余量不足 false：余量正常
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-02 13:03:35
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HVAC_FAULT_NOTIFY

        static final int HVAC_FAULT_NOTIFY
        When the air conditioning related functions are not available, a pop-up window will be displayed when the user clicks. For example, seat ventilation, heating, steering wheel heating, etc. Original DX interface HVAC_FUNC_HEAT_VENTILATION_POP 空调相关功能不可用情况下，用户点击时进行弹窗提醒。例如座椅通风、加热、方向盘加热等。原DX接口HVAC_FUNC_HEAT_VENTILATION_POP
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • IHvac.HvacFaultNotify property type
        jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-26 12:56:35
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
